summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auto-logout and Session Management feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Sessions tab visibility (admin-only), auto-logout toggle/dropdown, session list with TU badge, Cerrar buttons, and confirm dialog.
test_credentials: Admin PIN: 1000, OSCAR (Cajero) PIN: 1111, Carlos (Mesero) PIN: 100
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Management feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/auth/auto-logout-config, PUT /api/auth/auto-logout-config (admin only), GET /api/auth/active-sessions (admin only), POST /api/auth/revoke-session/{user_id} (admin only), POST /api/auth/heartbeat. Frontend: SessionsTab component at /settings?tab=sesiones (admin only). Auto-logout config stored in MongoDB system_config with id='auto_logout'. Active sessions in active_sessions collection. Revoked sessions in revoked_sessions collection.

backend.PUT /api/auth/auto-logout-config (admin: PASS - Admin can update, non-admin gets 403
backend.GET /api/auth/active-sessions (admin onl: PASS - Returns list with user_id, user_name, role, last_activity
backend.POST /api/auth/revoke-session/{user_id}: PASS - Revokes session, removes from active_sessions
backend.Revoked session returns 401: PASS - Returns 401 with 'Sesion cerrada por administrador'

frontend.Sessions tab visible for admin only: PASS - Tab visible at /settings?tab=sesiones for admin
frontend.Sessions tab NOT visible for non-admin: PASS - Oscar (Cajero) cannot see Sessions tab
frontend.Cerrar button for other users: PASS - Visible for OSCAR and Carlos, NOT for Admin (current user)
frontend.Confirm dialog before revoke: PASS - Shows dialog with user name and Cancelar/Cerrar sesion buttons
frontend.Refresh sessions button: PASS - Refrescar button visible and functional
